function.name: search_documents
function.description: Search uploaded private documents in the local Knowledge base (RAG). Prefer this FIRST when the user asks about uploaded PDFs/DOCX/MD, company policies, project docs, or anything that should be answered from their Knowledge panel sources. Do NOT use for breaking news or public encyclopedic facts — use web_search / wikipedia_lookup / arxiv_search instead. Always cite filenames from the returned chunks.

query.description: The search query to find relevant documents

top_k.description: Number of top results to return (default: 4)

allowed_sources.description: Optional filename filter — only search these source files (must match uploaded names)

function.name: summarize_documents
function.description: Generate a summary of documents in the local Knowledge project. Use when the user asks to tóm tắt / summarize uploaded docs. Prefer over web_search for private uploads.

sources.description: Optional list of source filenames to summarize; omit for all

function.name: generate_document_report
function.description: Generate a research/study report from uploaded documents. Use when the user asks for báo cáo / report based on their Knowledge sources.

sources.description: Optional list of source filenames; omit for all
